summary: Citation-grounded medical RAG assistant. FastAPI serves a motion-design UI and the API from one origin; ChromaDB + OpenAI power retrieval and answers.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.detail: Landing (hero, search, quick-starts, 'Specialised in' topics, marquee) + app shell (topbar, chat, evidence panel) + citation modal + custom cursor. Served at the same origin as the API.

nodes.label: style.css
nodes.detail: Design system (navy/teal tokens), aurora mesh background, glassmorphism, motion (cursor, 3D tilt, scroll reveals, shimmer, marquee). Full prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

nodes.label: app.js
nodes.detail: All frontend logic: health polling + status dot, /api/chat call with real-error display, evidence panel + confidence meter, citation modal, auto topics (loadTopics), and the motion layer (cursor, magnetic, tilt, reveals, parallax).

nodes.label: main.py
nodes.detail: FastAPI app. Serves frontend via StaticFiles + routes /api/health, /api/topics, /api/chat. Permissive CORS backup. Catches errors -> readable JSON. Top-of-file pysqlite3 shim + sys.path insert for serverless.

nodes.label: rag.py
nodes.detail: RAG core: get_openai (lazy, readable no-key error), get_collection (Chroma, embedding_function=None), embed_texts, chunk_text, retrieve, list_topics, confidence_from, answer_question (always returns a dict).

nodes.label: ingest.py
nodes.detail: Reads data/*.md (+ front matter), chunks, embeds via OpenAI, writes ChromaDB. Rebuilds the collection each run. Run after any data change.

nodes.label: config.py
nodes.detail: Reads .env; exposes OPENAI_API_KEY, models, paths, chunk sizes, HAS_KEY. Never raises if the key is missing.

nodes.label: /api/health
nodes.detail: Returns {ok, has_key, num_chunks, chat_model}. Drives the status dot in the UI.

nodes.label: /api/topics
nodes.detail: Returns distinct indexed documents -> powers the auto 'Specialised in' list. Calls rag.list_topics().

nodes.label: /api/chat
nodes.detail: POST {question} -> rag.answer_question(). Returns answer + ranked sources + confidence, or a readable error.

nodes.label: ChromaDB
nodes.detail: Local persistent vector store (backend/chroma_store/). Cosine space. We supply embeddings ourselves (no auto-download).

nodes.label: OpenAI embeddings
nodes.detail: text-embedding-3-small. Used at ingest time and per query. Paid API.

nodes.label: OpenAI gpt-4o-mini
nodes.detail: Chat model that writes the grounded, cited answer at temperature 0.1.

nodes.label: data/*.md
nodes.detail: Sourced clinical guideline snippets with front matter (source, title, year, evidence_level, url). Currently: T2DM, hypertension, AF, headache.

nodes.label: RAG pipeline
nodes.detail: Retrieve top-k chunks -> build grounded prompt -> LLM answer with [n] citations. Core value loop.

nodes.label: Citations
nodes.detail: LLM appends [n] markers; frontend maps them to clickable chips -> source modal with snippet + copy citation.

nodes.label: Confidence
nodes.detail: MVP signal from retrieval similarity (top + avg). Colors: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INSUFFICIENT. Phase 2 -> NLI.

nodes.label: Same-origin fix
nodes.detail: THE key decision. FastAPI serves the page; frontend uses relative /api paths. Eliminates CORS 'unable to fetch'.

nodes.label: Motion UI
nodes.detail: Magnetic custom cursor, 3D tilt cards, parallax mesh, kinetic marquee, staggered scroll reveals, glassmorphism. Vanilla, no build.

nodes.label: Auto topic discovery
nodes.detail: Site reads its own index metadata and shows exactly what it can answer. Updates itself on re-ingest.

nodes.label: Vercel
nodes.detail: Serverless host. Needs pysqlite3-binary shim for Chroma's sqlite. Read-only FS -> ship/build the index at deploy time. Live: rag-medical-assistant-five.vercel.app

nodes.label: PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
nodes.detail: The future-session brain: architecture, file map, decisions, gotchas, re-onboarding checklist.

nodes.label: WORKING_PLAN_v2.md
nodes.detail: Lean MVP-first plan + what was cut from the original (Milvus, UMLS, rerank, NLI, Next.js).

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.detail: Public GitHub readme: banner, badges, Mermaid diagram, quick start, Vercel deploy, live demo link.
